first_dialog: Hey, you shouldn't be back her- actually who am I kidding, I don't get paid enough to care about this. What do you want kid? Make it quick, I'm on my break right now.
The heck if I know, we're out of stock and I don't know when we're going to get another shipment. You're out of luck kid.
Yeah, I know it sucks, I can't even get the parts to upgrade my PC. Maybe when the manager comes by you can talk to him and he might give you a gift card as compensation.
Kid, I am not paid enough to care so go away, I need to doomscroll on my phone and grind points in Space Raiders Online.
player_dialog: Where can I find a Swapdeck console?
I don't want a gift card though.
possible_dialog: Kid, whatever you want help with, it's above my pay grade.
I don't get paid enough for this stupid job...
I need to ask for a raise...
*He gives you the stink eye, you should probably go.*
Ugh, why do you keep bothering me after I said I couldn't help you?
